designSystem.style: Dark neighborhood OS — deep navy backgrounds with vibrant green primary accent and warm amber for credits/urgency. Layered card surfaces with subtle borders create depth. Rounded corners (14–16px) throughout for approachability. Trust and warmth conveyed through emoji-rich content and soft glow effects.

screens: Home Feed — micro-need posts with urgency tags, filter chips, and one-tap help responses
Silent Matches — ranked neighbor cards with match percentage, skills, and availability
Circles — sub-community hubs for buildings, blocks, and parent groups with active needs
Profile — reciprocity credits bar, exchange history, trust badges, and stats
interactions: Post modal with 3-step flow: category selection → details → privacy radius
Filter chips for Feed by urgency and category
Match detail drawer with full profile view
Circle drill-down showing active needs within that community
